<!--
Thanks for the PR! A short checklist below; not all items apply to every
change.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what changed and why. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify? Logs, screenshots, repro steps. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes locally
- [ ] Component changes include / update a Storybook story
- [ ] Component changes include / update a unit test (and a11y audit)
- [ ] Visual changes have updated screenshot baselines (or this PR doesn't
      touch component visuals)
- [ ] User-facing change has a changeset (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Docs site pages updated if the API changed
